## What / 变更内容

<!-- Describe what you changed / 描述你修改了什么 -->

## Type / 类型

- [ ] 📝 New company submission / 新公司提交
- [ ] ✏️ Update existing data / 更新已有数据
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix / 修复错误
- [ ] ✨ Feature / 新功能
- [ ] 📖 Documentation / 文档

## Checklist / 检查清单

- [ ] Data passes validation (`python scripts/validate.py`) / 数据通过验证
- [ ] No sensitive information included / 不包含敏感信息
- [ ] Company name and details are accurate / 公司名称和详情准确
